mapper.sql: ROrderNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, ROrdDate, DlvEntire, DlvSite, TransFee, TransChannel, PrjCode, ORorderNo, DlvType, Employee, EmployeeNo, OptTime, Operator, DeptNo, ContractNo, QuotationNo, PurchaseNO, CttFlag, Ordtype, TypeCode, PriceChecked, HLCode, TradeCompanyId, IsConfirm, Inserttime
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.mig_RcvMaster
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.mig_RcvMaster (ROrderNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, ROrdDate, DlvEntire, DlvSite, TransFee, TransChannel, PrjCode, ORorderNo, DlvType, Employee, EmployeeNo, OptTime, Operator, DeptNo, ContractNo, QuotationNo, PurchaseNO, CttFlag, Ordtype, TypeCode, PriceChecked, HLCode, TradeCompanyId, IsConfirm, Inserttime ) values (#{rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{userno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dlventire,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvsite,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{transchannel,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{prjcode,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ororderno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{employee,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{employeeno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptno,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quotationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cttflag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ordtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{typecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pricechecked,jdbcType=BIT}, #{hlcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isconfirm,jdbcType=BIT}, #{inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

update dbo.mig_RcvMaster
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
ROrdDate = #{record.rorddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

TradeCompanyId = #{record.tradecompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IsConfirm = #{record.isconfirm,jdbcType=BIT},
Inserttime = #{record.inserttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
